name: Prisma Shade
description: A rare jewel of the void. How could anything so beautiful be crafted for stealth?

patchlogs.name: Update 28: The Deadlock Protocol
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed inability to trade Prisma Shade and Prisma Burst Laser.

patchlogs.name: The Sacrifice: Prime Vault Hotfix 23.1.2!
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Prisma Shade removing cosmetics as per: https://forums.warframe.com/topic/787411-shade-stealth-ability-can-remove-head-or-cosmetics/
